Hi Ian,

Following up on your questions during our last bi-weekly meeting, here you
may find the CS team update deck as attached. This deck covers following
topics:

   - By-month target setting and detailed initiative plan
   - Discussion topic: FRT (First response time) comparison vs. local
   SCS/SIP and CB Top Sellers
   - Discussion topic: Chatbot LLM & NLU application in pre-sales & after
   sales scenarios
   - Appendix: By-site performance of CS team

Please let us know if you have any questions. Thanks!
